question: Which donut has a hole in it? Select from the following options: (A) the one on the top left of the tray. (B) the one on the bottom left of the tray. (C) the one on the top right of the tray. (D) the one on the bottom right of the tray.
gold_answer: the one on the bottom right of the tray
answer_choices: the one on the top left of the tray
the one on the bottom left of the tray
the one on the top right of the tray
the one on the bottom right of the tray
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
